name: 少女与机甲/Girls And Robots
short_description: Girls and Robots is a rougelike game.Player can pick three diferent girls and robots, to make a special team to fight with monsters and bugs .They will face thounds monsters and bugs, fight, live, evolution and find the trueth of the lost world.
detailed_description: Players can choose from nine different girls and nine different robots to form a team of three.In the apocalyptic world, you have to face endless monsters. Now pick up your weapons and start fighting! You must choose the right girl and robot to form a unique team to complete different challenges. Find and discover the truth of world destruction and ways to save the world. Strive to survive, evolve, find the cause of the world's destruction in the midst of gunfire and bullets, and strive to save the world from monsters!
about_the_game: Players can choose from nine different girls and nine different robots to form a team of three.In the apocalyptic world, you have to face endless monsters. supported_languages:
Simplified Chinese*, English
*languages with full audio support
